generated_oml:
instance SerialRobotMABIMAX100 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes, comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, gear transmission, and Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for precise motion control."
]

instance RobotPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensors for the six axes of the MABI MAX 100 serial robot."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance RobotPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time series sensor data streamed via MQTT protocol in one-way data flow from physical to digital."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RobotPositionSensor
]

instance RobotSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series position and motion data from robot axes."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) utilizing SysML for multi-layered system modeling across requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance ACMEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language (ACME) for describing components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEEnabler
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language (AADL) for describing components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language (MontiArc) for describing components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs) for describing components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBDsEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]

    base:desc "SysML state machines for behavioral modeling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStateMachineEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CppCodeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C++ code for detailed behavior analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppEnabler
]

    base:desc "Java code for detailed behavior analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaEnabler
]

    base:desc "SysML for multi-level abstraction in Model-Based Systems Engineering."

]

    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService

    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for managing system complexity across abstraction levels."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService

instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction to enhance motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization via dashboard for monitoring and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction through model-based analytics."
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard for real-time user interaction and decision support."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction exists as digital shadows function as passive entities with no data or command flow back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization via MQTT streaming of sensor time series data, integrating live data with white- and black-box friction models during operation for continuous digital shadow updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) implemented as a UML class diagram, comprising data traces, aggregation layers, and a Processing component that consumes input data traces and produces output data for specific manufacturing purposes."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle stages are structured according to Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) abstraction levels, including requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer, as described in Section II.A. SysML is utilized for modeling these levels during development."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for sensor data streaming; network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration using Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized asset representation and MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming with external systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system complies with Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) standards, utilizing SysML for component & connector modeling as demonstrated in Fig. 3, ensuring interoperability with industry-specific modeling specifications."
]
